mission.title: openeverest: Everest 1.8.0 upgrade error — empty namespace may not be set
mission.description: Upgrading OpenEverest to 1.8.0 fails with 'an empty namespace may not be set when a resource name is provided' and 'could not retrieve subscription'. This affects both everestctl upgrade and helm upgrade paths.

steps.title: Identify the upgrade error
steps.description:
Check the error output when running the upgrade:
```bash
everestctl upgrade --dry-run
```
If you see 'an empty namespace may not be set when a resource name is provided', this is a known issue with empty namespace references in the Everest configuration.

steps.title: Check for empty namespace entries
steps.description:
List all namespaces managed by Everest and check for empty entries:
```bash
kubectl get configmap everest-settings -n everest-system -o yaml
kubectl get namespace -l app.kubernetes.io/managed-by=everest
```
Look for any empty or malformed namespace references.

steps.title: Apply the fix
steps.description:
Clean up any empty namespace references in the Everest configuration before upgrading:
```bash
kubectl edit configmap everest-settings -n everest-system
```
Remove any empty string entries from the namespace list.

If the Helm upgrade hangs with 'context canceled' due to a pre-upgrade hook, delete the stuck hook job:
```bash
kubectl delete job -l app.kubernetes.io/component=pre-upgrade-hook -n everest-system
```

Then retry the upgrade:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade everest-core percona/everest --namespace everest-system
```

steps.title: Confirm the upgrade succeeded
steps.description:
Verify the upgrade completed successfully:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n everest-system
helm list -n everest-system
everestctl version
```

resolution.summary: The upgrade fails due to empty namespace references in the Everest configuration. Remove empty namespace entries from the everest-settings configmap, delete any stuck pre-upgrade hook jobs, then retry the upgrade.
codeSnippets: kubectl get configmap everest-settings -n everest-system -o yaml

prerequisites.description: A Kubernetes cluster with OpenEverest installed, attempting to upgrade to 1.8.0+.
